mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : listPageing 설 명 : 사용자 정보 변경 로그 페이징 목록 */
SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM ASC) AS LINE_NO ,A.FRST_INQ_DTTM ,A.USER_ID ,A.CHG_GBNCD ,A.CHGBFR_CTS ,A.CHGAFT_CTS ,A.CNTN_IP ,A.RGTR_ID ,( SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM FROM TB_LMS_USER_INFO_CHG_HSTRY A WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} ) T WHERE T.LINE_NO BETWEEN #{firstIndex} AND #{listScale}

/* SQL ID : count 설 명 : 사용자 정보 변경 로그 전체 카운트 */
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_USER_INFO_CHG_HSTRY A WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId}
